item.title: It's yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
that's not motor oil!
pretty terrible coloring job by all
classy
is that normal?
much more
rod stewart is the man
vegan cocaine slaps
mmm hmm
i guess
it does really work
i don't know what any of this means
it should be
an odd read
gross
yes i've posted this at least 8 times
what of it?
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Every year this kind man, who rescued this dog as a puppy, comes to visit the dog in his new forever home and the bond they share is as pure as it gets
item.dc:creator: TheWhatever666

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Tuesday random meme dump of pure chaos
item.description:
1. The age of men is over, the time of chicken has come!
2. He's been hurt too many times, got it right this time
3. Movie extra records a kid practicing lines
4. A truly unhackable door
5. The wingman we all need
6
7
8. You can take only one on a date - left or right?
9
10. Alien Animal Planet: "Here we have a female of homo species doing a traditional mating dance. Let's see if it works!"
11. Dog helps settle a dispute
12
13. Cleaning up the streets
14. No need for a paternity test over here
15. Thank you for making it to the end of the dump. I hope you don't mind me sharing that for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. As indie developers, your support means the world to us. By adding our game to your wishlist, you’ll help us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. Here it is: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ We can’t do this without you. Thank you for supporting our dream and joining us on this wild adventure!

item.dc:creator: DarthPutinKGB

item.title: Dumping memes at a 45° angle
item.description:
So much space for forehead kisses...
Sorry to anyone who dared subscribe to me. I'm about to dump out as much as I can in an hour to clear my phone. These go back to last October obviously.
Miss this king
Oh shit, it me
We did it, friends! We made AI dumber!
I mentioned this to my dad and he's just like "well yeah, the system..." uh, dad, we uh... nevermind
Never let John do what Jodie would have gotten right
As one does
Same. This year so far, I had a mess at work, got the worst food poisoning of my life that lasted 5 days while out of town, lost my mom, and developed neck problems. But I got a dog!
I have recipes
True, I grew up watching Captain Picard from my dad's lap
We need to recreate this as a festival
Sick burn, Glinda
Why is this so accurate
Saved this for my gen psych class to remind them not to self diagnose. Let someone who has no idea what is going on in your head do it...
I mean...
Sent this to my sister and she heartily agreed
I hated artificial grape and cherry flavors my whole life, but I love fake banana. Gimme some of that extinct banana species flavor baby.
Shout-out to my old college GBF!!!
It really doesn't
Ope, that'll be a tough one
My dad has that one!!
I opened mine last year in a public restaurant with a friend. We laughed so hard.
Glory to you and your problem solving abilities
Pet tax! Violet (dog) really wants to snuggle, but Clarice (cat) would rather not.
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish

item.title: Story Time
item.description: The car in question was sold 8 years ago, my friend doesn’t play softball, I’m properly insured, and I haven’t been socially inept since high school. Jfc that sucked though. MV edit: Y’all are just the best. Be nice to someone today. <3

item.dc:creator: NotSlybo

item.title: Not really holding it together...
item.description: So almost a year ago, I decided to move to Arkansas with my best friends family from Georgia. My buddies mom is retiring out here and bought some decent acreage. The plan was for everyone to build a home on a part of the land eventually, but for now most of us are in the same house. My friend and his wife are open minded and liberal leaning, whilst the rest of the family is anywhere from moderate to almost alt right, the youngest couple(his nephew) being the most vocal in their opinions(maga). On the other hand his mom is a devout Catholic that tries to help everyone she can without prejudice. I moved in with them in HS at 18 to escape an abusive home (I'm 32 now). I don't talk to my biological parents at all, but I've always looked at his mom as my own. In the last few weeks I decided to look inward and address a lot of the repressed feelings I had dealt with in the past. I have been divorced for 4 and a half years and not in a single relationship since 2020. I used the time to work on myself, I had relied on other people and tried to numb myself with painkillers then weed. Smoked everyday for 13 years to cope with this excuse or another. When my egg cracked it was like a flood of emotions I couldn't hold in. I stopped smoking immediately I had no drive to anymore, I spent hours reading up on it and reflecting on my early childhood. I realized I knew when I was 7, spent time as a teenager putting on clothes in secret, but repressed it due to my parents and their views. I thought if my dad knew I was even pan, he would have beat me to near death, so saying anything more...I don't want to imagine. Back to the present and I decide since I'm going to start hrt ( started on the 3rd of July) I should tell my buddies family, he already knew and is supportive to a degree, though I feel he's processing it in his own way and won't vocalize his concerns for whatever reason. I know this process takes time for others to get used to but almost everyone's attitudes changed towards me overnight. His mom's words were while she had no place to judge, that if I stay the kids won't understand. At the time I also shared a room with the eldest teenager, and they didn't want me going mtf to cause issues. I'll likely not see the youngest ones 1, 3, and 6 bc Ill likely have to be out before they get back from vacationing in ga with their grandma. The ones who didn't care for my views and lifestyle continue to avoid me like the plague, but the other adults, my buddies sister, mom, niece, even him, all act entirely different around me now. They suggested I find a place elsewhere to transition without causing issues with the kids, the ironic part is the kid I share a room with has the biggest heart, and is the only one who still treats me the exact same ( I fucking love gen z sometimes) bc he has friends at school like that and is a true ally for them as well. ( Has finished some fights protecting people in his class) I'm absolutely terrified to be on my own in this shit hole of a state. It's as if I can't even enjoy the process of discovering myself without it being tainted by the anxiety of all of this, and from the people I thought were my chosen family. It kills me because they get their info from the worst sources and all I can think is, "you know me, you've known me my whole life and yet you'll take the word of a bigot on TV over my own" I spend the night just having panic attacks, can't even get my bestie to just chat with me about it without him mansplaining something or showing emotionally he doesn't understand. It hurts to feel so isolated, and I am struggling so hard right now. I asked him a while back to please hide his pistol and bullets , if not for me then the kids. He hasn't done so and I had it pressed to my temple this past morning.... I knew this was going to be hard, and I want to make it to the other side, to be the me I am on the inside, but the struggle is real. Not sure if this will even get seen... but hug someone you love for me and tell them they matter. Edit: thank you all for the kind words and encouragement. I'm going to spend time after work looking for a good support group I can meet with. Here I am balling my eyes out before work but they are happy tears today, so thank you again to all you kind Imgurians and your support. Edit 2: I really am overwhelmed with all the kindness, I am going to try and respond to each of you today when I get the time, I chose to live here, 10 Hours from home, bc I was invited to help build up the property, not from any lack of finances. I was licensed in termite in ga and made bank there with my own place. I'm sure a clarification won't stop the trolls, so try not to feed them too much.
item.dc:creator: transyam

item.title: Every fact check site: It never happened. Every commenter: I read it on Facebook.
item.dc:creator: MenloPart

item.title: “Greatest country in the world” give me a fucking break.
item.description: I’m relatively new to this club, covid disabled me, I was a young fit healthy 30 year old, everything went up in smoke 2.5 years ago. I hate that my life is this now. Can’t get hardly any acknowledgement from doctors or society in general. It’s awful. It’s not fair. Many think I’m just making it up, like why would I destroy my own life for no reason at all? I guess I didn’t like being able to live my life normally and do all the things I like to do so I decided one day to just make up that I have all these torturous symptoms. I just want my old life back, nothing more. I don’t think I’ll ever get it back though. I’m in the process of applying for disability but the outlook is pretty grim, even if I do get approved, it’s a very meager existence to put it lightly. There’s so much stigma about all of this too, people think that we’re just sitting at home collecting free money like we’re on permanent vacation or something. We paid into this and I guarantee none of us WANT this life. I tried forcing myself to work for the first year of my condition until forcing it landed me in the hospital for 8 days with a suspected stroke. I’ve been on temporary disability ever since and I’m in the process of transferring to long term social security disability. I’m worried because if I don’t get approved in a somewhat timely manner, it’s a very real possibility I could end up on the street, and the scary part is dealing with all these permanent symptoms is hard enough when I have a place to live, it’ll be even harder dealing with a severe medical issue while homeless.
item.dc:creator: CapnAdorable

item.title: Highly recommend
item.description: We are both passionate people who work in customer service at the same business. We also both have limited social batteries. There have been many times when one of our batteries was full and the other one's was empty. Those interactions usually wound up in a misunderstanding that often turned into a fight. We eventually came up with the idea of using our bedroom safe word to protect ourselves and each other from undesirable interactions. It's worked incredibly well, mostly because of our mutual respect for each other and solid communication. Once somebody uses the safe word, it's typically followed by and "I love you" and the hug or a kiss. Meanwhile the receiver understands to respectfully and gracefully disengage. Unless it is a time-sensitive, pressing matter, most conversations can be taken up at a later date. Anyway, I hope this is useful to someone out there. It took me decades of multiple relationships to discover this gem and I'm really proud of my partner and I ifor creating and implementing it so well.
item.dc:creator: meme2theextreme

item.title: More memes? Yes! 46th edition
item.description:
Third in an hour. I have enough for like 12 more full sized dumps. I should save more fiber in my phone.
My dad made me sad pointing out that their feathers are clipped. Hopefully it's in a rescue and recovering well.
My niece knows the German phrase, "you have a very punchable face". I need to memorize it.
My mom and I used to watch old cheesy horror movies together. I haven't watched one since she died. Not the same without her pointing out strings holding up the props.
Nostalgic a/f, 5 stars
So called out rn
I'm reading the witcher books. Dandelion is the greatest. Love that dumbass.
If you put ketchup on noodles we can't be friends
This has more weight in December
I've been to both places on wildlife tours. This is super accurate.
She licked my Lighthouse until I shone out to sea
I actually sent this to my boss because I thought she might be able to do something about the dip wagon who runs our grounds team...
My mom had printed weekly calendars for all of us in front of the back door when I was a teenager. She still would ask if I worked Tuesday. Yes. I work every Tuesday, 4-9pm.
Fair
Saved for mom before she died. She used a wheelchair for 13 years. It's disgusting how inaccessible the US is.
That's cold...... [gonzo face]
Okay that hurts more than assuming I did it on purpose
Just lol'ed at my own memes because they've been in here so long I forgot how funny they are
The worms are for my niece. She loves them so much she has 10 rainbow worms tied to the ceiling fan in her bedroom.
I think there's a young Paul and an old Paul and that's where the extra is
Dog tax: Maggie (left) also not wanting to snuggle with Violet
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish
